headline: Combined ratio from 101.5% to 89.2% at CBA. Turnarounds delivered at Suncorp and SCI.
evidence: Diagnosed root causes and designed phased transformations at CBA (combined ratio 101.5% to 89.2%), Suncorp (105% to 98%), and SCI (digital availability less than 5% to 60%). Originated the Westpac-Allianz strategic alliance recommendation. Positioned CBA for divestment with joint strategy and a three-year funded roadmap.
